failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: 0vMBki
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"detail":"Error listing jobs"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita--vecinita-scraper-api-fastapi.modal.run/jobs?user_id=null&x-schemathesis-unknown-property=42'

1. Test Case ID: IxYiur
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"detail":"Internal server error"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET https://vecinita--vecinita-scraper-api-fastapi.modal.run/jobs/0
